'''Sabol''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] who was stationed in [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] during [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

==Biography==
During her time in Bestine, Sabol was tasked with the duty of assassinating a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|General]] aboard a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]]. Seeing no reason why this Rebel should survive, she tasked a group of Imperials to board the Corvette and eliminate the Rebel General for her. However, before the Imperials could be granted passage to the Corvette, she had to first acquire Rebel documents with important information. After searching various locations, including the [[Dantooine base/Legends|abandoned Rebel base]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], the crashed [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] [[Passenger liner/Legends|liner]] ''[[Tzarina]]'' on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], and the [[Anchorhead Tavern]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], the Imperials finally found the documents Sabol sought. The Imperials were then given a ticket to hand to an Imperial [[TIE pilot]] at the [[Emperor's Retreat/Legends|Emperor's Retreat]].

From here, the Imperials were flown on a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] to the Corvette. After boarding the Corvette, the Imperial fought their way through the corridors, and assassinated the Rebel General. After evacuating the Corvette through the ship's [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], the Imperial returned to Sabol, and were commended for their service. The [[Medal of Honor (Imperial)/Legends|Imperial Medal of Honor]] was awarded to the Imperials for their exemplary work.

==Behind the scenes==
Sabol is a [[Wikipedia:non-player character|Non-Player Character]] in the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. In the game, players may take a mission from her which involves killing a Rebel General on a Corvette. After completing the mission, the players are given a badge, a schematic for an [[AV-21 Landspeeder|AV-21]], and several other rewards.
